name: Merrill Lynch Financial Advisor Ted Candella
description_short: The Candella Group is a Merrill Lynch Wealth Management advisory firm offering comprehensive financial planning, investment management, and banking services to individuals, families, and small businesses in New York.
description_long:
The Candella Group operates as part of Merrill Lynch Wealth Management, one of the largest financial advisory platforms in the United States. Led by Managing Director Ted Candella and a team of credentialed wealth advisors, the firm is based at 200 Park Avenue in Manhattan and serves high-net-worth clients seeking personalized financial guidance. The group has earned recognition as a Forbes "Best-in-State Wealth Advisor" from 2019-2022, indicating consistent peer recognition in the wealth management space.

The firm offers a broad spectrum of financial services integrated across Merrill Lynch and Bank of America platforms. Services include personal banking and lending products from Bank of America, comprehensive investment solutions through Merrill Lynch, retirement and savings account management, insurance products, and sophisticated wealth planning strategies. Clients gain access to both investment advisory services and traditional banking capabilities, creating a consolidated financial relationship under one advisor team.

What distinguishes The Candella Group is their emphasis on behavioral finance and personalized approach. They utilize Merrill Lynch's Investment Personality Assessment to understand client investing preferences and psychology before developing customized strategies. The firm positions itself as relationship-focused rather than transaction-focused, emphasizing a "concierge service" model with ongoing guidance. The team includes multiple credentialed advisors (CKP®, CPFA®, CRPC™, CPWA®, CFP® designations) and offers resources including planning tools, market insights, articles, and educational events.

This is a premium wealth management practice targeting clients with substantial assets and complex financial situations. The Park Avenue location, focus on high-net-worth individuals and families, and integrated Merrill Lynch/Bank of America platform positioning indicate this is not a retail banking option for average consumers. There are no disclosed fee structures, minimum account requirements, or specific product pricing on the website, which is typical for advisory firms that customize pricing based on assets under management and relationship complexity.
address: 1 Bryant Pk 5th Floor, New York, NY 10036

company_info.headquarters: 1 Bryant Pk 5th Floor, New York, NY 10036

pros: Forbes "Best-in-State Wealth Advisor" recognition 2019-2022, indicating third-party validation of advisor quality
Team includes multiple credentialed professionals with advanced designations (CKP®, CPFA®, CRPC™, CPWA®, CFP®)
Integrated access to both Merrill Lynch investment products and Bank of America banking and lending services
Personalized approach using Investment Personality Assessment to align investment strategy with client psychology
Comprehensive service offering spanning banking, lending, investing, retirement accounts, insurance, and wealth planning
Established practice with dedicated concierge-level service model and ongoing advisory relationship
Educational resources including market insights, planning tools, articles, and events to keep clients informed
cons: No transparency on fee structure, minimum account sizes, or service eligibility criteria disclosed on website
Park Avenue location and positioning suggests this is a premium service not accessible to typical retail banking customers
Limited information about specific investment philosophy or performance track record beyond general descriptions
Merrill Lynch's parent company Bank of America has faced regulatory scrutiny in wealth management; no disclosure of firm's specific compliance history
Website provides no client reviews, testimonials, or case studies to evaluate actual service quality and outcomes
best_for: High-net-worth individuals and families seeking integrated wealth planning across investments, banking, and insurance
Business owners and entrepreneurs needing comprehensive financial strategy and executive banking services
Clients preferring consolidated advisory relationships with multiple credentialed professionals rather than individual advisors
Investors interested in behavioral finance approach and personalized investment psychology assessment
diagnosis: The Candella Group is best for affluent individuals, families, and business owners seeking premium wealth management with integrated banking and investment services through an established Merrill Lynch advisory practice. The primary caveat is that this is a high-touch, likely high-minimum practice with no transparency about accessibility, fees, or specific service eligibility—consumers should expect this is positioned for clients with substantial assets and should verify minimum requirements and fee structures before contacting the firm.
services: Personal banking products (checking, savings accounts, deposits)
Retirement and savings account planning and management
Comprehensive wealth planning and financial strategy
Investment Personality Assessment and behavioral finance analysis
Financial goal tracking and planning tools
Educational insights, market briefs, and investment articles
Ongoing concierge advisory service and guidance
